name: Octi
author: Don Green (1999) / AGP port
description: Octi (Don Green, 1999; MENSA Select) — the basic 2-player game on a 6x7 board. Each side has 4 pods and 12 prongs. A pod gains a movement direction only when you add a prong (arrow) to it. Each turn: add a prong, move a pod one square in a pronged direction, or jump (over a pod into the empty square beyond, chaining, optionally capturing jumped enemy pods). Win by landing a pod on any enemy base square, or by capturing all enemy pods.
